ops.body: Phase C deploy done on this host (2026-07-18 ~18:00): install-launchd from the released 0.16.0 wheel rewrote all three agents (pipeline kept --journal-repo ~/Code/cc-steer; hardened ccp guard + ==0.16.0 pins verified in the plists) and bounced them. com.cc-steer.watch: runs=1, single clean start, banner normal, idle footprint 432MB phys (was ~5GB eager) — lazy startup proven in production. 1h soak monitor armed on watch.log (restarts/tracebacks/proposals). Also: rapid-mlx:8400 (35B MoE resident since Jul 14, ~20GB) stopped via athome serve down after re-verifying operator idle — safe because every consumer path calls ManagedServer.ensure() per use (respawn on demand); operator note left in experiment-at-home cc-notes (8394969) recommending ManagedServer.idle(ttl_s=...) for long-lived serve consumers. ~24GB standing memory freed total.
